payload.description: Commuter railroad operating East of Hudson (Harlem, Hudson, New Haven, Penn Station Access Lines) and West of Hudson (Pascack Valley and Port Jervis Lines) services
Funds MNR - CDOT reimbursable operating revenue for Metro-North service
MTA Metro-North Railroad project to provide Metro-North service to Penn Station via the Amtrak Empire Connection, with related positions and financial adjustments
Metro-North commuter rail line serving New York City (Manhattan/Bronx) and Westchester County, with commutation and non-commutation ridership reported
Metro-North commuter rail line serving Manhattan/Bronx and Hudson Valley counties, with commutation and non-commutation ridership reported
Metro-North commuter rail line serving New York State and Connecticut, with commutation and non-commutation ridership reported
New Metro-North service line accessing Penn Station via Amtrak Empire Connection, with projected ridership beginning in 2027
Metro-North West of Hudson service; included in West of Hudson total ridership
Metro-North West of Hudson service; included in West of Hudson total ridership
